items.name: Veg (Paneer) Momo 6pcs
items.description: Juicy minced veg and paneer mixed with Nepalese spices, wrapped in the pastry. CHOICES OF Steamed or coated with breadcrumbs & cornflour and deep fried to make it crispy served with THB special Momo sauce.

items.name: Mixed Veg Pakaura 5pcs
items.description: Mixed veg deep fried fritters mixed with gram flour & spices served with mint & yoghurt sauce.

items.name: Chana Chatpate
items.description: Nepalese sour, hot & spicy street food prepared with mixture of peas, puffed rice, lime, potatoes, noodles & spices; served COLD.

items.name: Sadheko Badam (Peanuts Salad)
items.description: Nepali style spicy roasted peanuts mixed with lime, carrot & onion salsa, served COLD.

items.name: Nepali Aloo Ko Achar (Potato Salad)
items.description: Boiled potatoes marinated with Nepalese spices, cucumber, carrot & lemon juice, served COLD.

items.name: Nepali Samosa 2pcs
items.description: Homemade vegetable filled pastry served with tangy yoghurt, tamarind sauce and onion salsa.

items.name: Samosa Chat
items.description: Curry puffs made of potatoes, flattened & served COLD with mashed potatoes, onion, yoghurt, tamarind sauce, mint sauce & spices on top.

items.name: Pani Puri 10pcs
items.description: Fried plain flour balls, filled with mixture of tasty & spicy mash potatoes, onion, spices and refreshing homemade COLD pani (water).

items.name: Tandoori Paneer Tikka 4pcs
items.description: Indian cottage cheese marinated with spices in yoghurt sauce, cooked with capsicum & onions in clay oven and served with mint flavoured sauce.

items.name: Tandoori Soya Chaap 4pcs
items.description: Soybean protein (soya CHUNKS) marinated with various Nepalese spices, yoghurt sauce (coconut cream for vegan option), roasted (cooked) in clay oven (Tandoor).

items.name: Chicken Momo 6pcs
items.description: Juicy chicken mince mixed with veg and Nepalese spices, wrapped in the pastry. CHOICES OF Steamed or coated with breadcrumbs & cornflour and deep fried to make it crispy served with THB special Momo sauce.

items.name: Lamb Bone Soup
items.description: Soup made from lamb bones cooked with onion & verities of Nepalese spice.

items.name: The Chilli
items.description: Chicken breast, lollipops or buff sukuti, sautéed with chilli flakes, diced capsicum, onion, ginger, garlic & shallots, and spices.

items.name: Chicken Lollipops Fried 6pcs
items.description: Chicken wings marinated in spices and served Sauce & Salads.

items.name: Tandoori Chicken
items.description: Chicken with bone marinated in spices & tandoori sauce, cooked in tandoor & served with salad & sauce.

items.name: Tandoori Seafood
items.description: Prawns OR boneless fish fillets marinated in Indian spices & tandoori yoghurt sauce, freshly cooked in tandoor.

items.name: Chicken Tikka 4pcs / Chicken Sekuwa
items.description: Clay oven cooked boneless chicken, mix, and marinated with ground spices, creamy burnt butter coriander dressing.

variants.label: Nepalese Style Chicken Sekuwa Skewers served in smoky sizzler

items.name: Chicken Choila
items.description: Chicken fillets tossed on ginger & garlic, marinated in mustard oil, fresh coriander, and homemade roasted spices, SERVED COLD.

items.name: Khasi Ko Bhutan
items.description: Boiled goat pluck (intestine, liver etc.) mixed with homemade spices varieties & pan fried.

items.name: Buff Sukuti (Buffalo Jerky)
items.description: Dry buffalo meat pan-fried with onion and homemade spies.

items.name: Tareko Macha (Deep Fried Fish) 4pcs
items.description: Boneless fish, marinated in Nepalese spices and gram flour, deep fried and served with sauce.

items.name: Lamb Seekh Kebab 4pcs
items.description: Lamb mince mixed and marinated with various spices, cooked on skewers in clay oven (tandoor).

items.name: Barbique Platter for 2
items.description: Mixed platter of lamb seekh kebab, tandoori fish tikka, tandoori prawns and tandoori chicken quarter, served 2 pieces each.

items.name: Tandoori Chicken Platter
items.description: Tandoori chicken half, served with stir-fried mixed vegetables, chicken curry sauce and choices of rice/naan.

items.name: Lamb Shank
items.description: Lamb shanks slow cooked in Indian spices, yoghurt, tomato, and onion, served in thick sauce with naan & choices of mashed potatoes or rice; perfect diet for CANBERRA'S COLD WEATHER.

items.name: Daal Bhat (Daal with rice)
items.description: Mild lentils with rice (yellow lentil or daal makhani).

items.name: Butter Chicken with rice or cheese naan
items.description: Butter chicken with rice or cheese naan.

items.name: Chips with Nuggets
items.description: Chips with nuggets.

items.name: Chips / Nuggets
items.description: Chips only or nuggets 4pcs.

items.name: Kids Chowmein
items.description: Kids chowmein veg / egg / chicken.

items.name: Steamed Momo 10pcs
items.description: Juicy veg OR chicken mince mixed with Nepalese spices, wrapped in the pastry & served with The Hungry Buddha special Momo sauce. ONE FREE LAMB BONE SOUP WITH EACH SERVING OF MOMO, PLEASE SPECIFY WHILE PLACING THE ORDER.

items.name: Jhol Momo 10pcs
items.description: Momo dipped in the spicy sauce. Veg OR chicken.

items.name: Fried Momo 10pcs
items.description: Deep fried momo. Veg OR chicken.

items.name: Steamed C-Momo 10pcs
items.description: Steamed momo tossed in momo chilli (C = Momo Chilli). Veg OR chicken.

items.name: Fried C-Momo 10pcs
items.description: Fried momo tossed in momo chilli (C = Momo Chilli). Veg OR chicken.

items.name: Momo Platter 30pcs
items.description: A mixed platter with 3 varieties of momo: steamed, steamed c & fried, 10 pieces each.

items.name: Chowmein
items.description: Nepalese style stir fried noodles mixed with spices, veggies, chickpeas, sauce.

items.name: Thukpa
items.description: Noodles served in the tasty spicy sauce with veggies.

items.name: Chicken Choila Set
items.description: Traditional Nepalese snack platter served with half furandana (rice bubbles mixed with nuts and spices) and half beaten-rice, achar (potato salad), peanuts salad, salad and prawn crackers. Furandana contains nuts.

items.name: Chicken Sekuwa Set
items.description: Traditional Nepalese snack platter served with half furandana (rice bubbles mixed with nuts and spices) and half beaten-rice, achar (potato salad), peanuts salad, salad and prawn crackers. Furandana contains nuts.

items.name: Buff Sukuti Set
items.description: Traditional Nepalese snack platter served with half furandana (rice bubbles mixed with nuts and spices) and half beaten-rice, achar (potato salad), peanuts salad, salad and prawn crackers. Furandana contains nuts.

items.name: Khasi Ko Bhuttan Set
items.description: Traditional Nepalese snack platter served with half furandana (rice bubbles mixed with nuts and spices) and half beaten-rice, achar (potato salad), peanuts salad, salad and prawn crackers. Furandana contains nuts.

items.name: Dhido Gundruk Ko Thali Set
items.description: Nepalese traditional style buckwheat pudding meal served with ghee on top of pudding (DHIDO), gundruk bhatmas curry, stir fried green saag or other veg curry, green salad, yoghurt with GULAB JAMOON, Nepali pickle, papad, choice of meat curry (goat, lamb or boneless chicken) or paneer curry for veg with a rich gravy sauce.

items.name: Nepali Khana Ko Thali
items.description: Popularly known as DAAL BHAT TARKARI in Nepal, a traditional Nepali set dinner of rice & lentils served with a choice of meat (boneless chicken, lamb, goat) or paneer curry for veg together with a vegetable dish (gundruk or aloo tama or saag or other seasonal veggies), homemade pickle, GHEE, yoghurt, GULAB JAMOON & papad. Add-ons (order only after ordering thali): free one serve rice per thali and 1 pickle per thali; $4 each lentil, saag, aloo tama, gundruk; $6 each paneer curry, dhido, goat, lamb, chicken, gulab jamoon with yoghurt.

items.name: Soya Chaap
items.description: Soybean protein (CHUNKS) marinated with various spices, yoghurt sauce (coconut cream for vegan), roasted in clay oven, cooked to give taste like butter chicken, in creamy butter-tomato sauce for veg butter chicken, coconut cream and tomato sauce for vegan & in onion-tomato gravy for soya chaap masala.

items.name: Daal
items.description: Yellow lentils flambé with Himalayan spices, tossed with famous herb jimmu known as jhaneko daal, or slow cooked black lentils and kidney beans in dry spices, tomato and rich creamy sauce.

items.name: Bhindi Aloo Masala (Okra & Potatoes)
items.description: Okra & potatoes tossed with cumin, onions & spices, dry curry.

items.name: Aloo Bodi Tama (Bamboo shoot potato curry)
items.description: Bamboo shoots, black eyed beans and potato cooked with various spices to give a bit of sour Nepalese taste.

items.name: Gundruk Bhatmas Curry
items.description: Fermented & sun dried green leafy vegetables cooked with deep fried soybeans & potatoes in Himalayan style.

items.name: Mixed Vegetable Curry
items.description: Nepali mixed vegetable curry of cauliflower, broccoli, carrot, peas, potatoes (seasonal vegetables).

items.name: Mountain Eggplant Aloo
items.description: Eggplant and potatoes cooked in Himalayan spices to create a mountain favourite; dry curry.

items.name: Malai Kofta
items.description: Vegetable balls of cottage cheese, cream, cashews, sultanas & potatoes fried & cooked in spices with thick coconut sauce.

items.name: Aloo Gobi Matar
items.description: Cauliflower, potatoes and peas cooked with Himalayan spices; this lightly spiced dry curry is an old favourite.

items.name: Vegetable Korma
items.description: Mix vegetables curry with cream, cashew nuts, ground almond, coconut – a mildly spiced favourite.

items.name: Paneer (Indian Cottage Cheese)
items.description: Paneer & capsicum cooked in onion, spices & butter to create delicious Indian vegetarian PANEER BUTTER MASALA & KADAI PANEER with kadai masala, OR cooked with fine spinach paste to create saag paneer.

items.name: Chicken
items.description: Boneless chicken cooked as curry with exotic Nepali, Indian spices. Completed with black pepper for pep.ch. gravy.

items.name: Chicken Tikka Masala
items.description: Tandoori grilled chicken fillets cooked with sliced tomatoes, capsicum, & onion, finished with fresh coriander.

items.name: Butter Chicken with Honey; Boneless
items.description: Boneless chicken marinated in traditional Indian spices & cooked in butter, Honey & cream. NOTE: Base sauce pre-cooked and is sweet, if you asked for spicy, we could only add chilli on sweet sauce.

items.name: Mango Chicken
items.description: Mild curry made with the combination of thick onion gravy, cream, mango, coconut cream.

items.name: Korma
items.description: Mild traditional meat curry with cream, coconut, ground almond & fresh Indian spices.

items.name: Saag (Spinach)
items.description: Famous meat curry cooked with fine paste of spinach and cream, spices, an Indian favourite.

items.name: Lamb
items.description: Boneless lamb cooked in traditional Nepali style with tomatoes, coriander, ginger, bay leaves and spices.

items.name: Khasi Ko Masu (Goat Curry)
items.description: Exquisite curry of tender goat with bone enriched with the flavours of fenugreek, cinnamon, tomatoes, coriander, bay leaves, ginger, garlic - a famous specialty of Nepal.

items.name: Goat Bhutuwa
items.description: Nepalese traditional style dry curry cooked with tomato, onion, spices and flavoured with sliced onion, shallot.

items.name: Bhuna
items.description: Traditional Indian dish cooked with fresh coriander, pepper, garlic, diced capsicum, green chilli, yoghurt, spices.

items.name: Seafood Tarkari (Curry)
items.description: Seafood simmered in traditional spices, lemongrass, lime leaves, mustard seeds, onion, coconut milk.

items.name: Vindaloo
items.description: Curry cooked in fresh spices, malt vinegar, paprika, red chillies and fresh coriander leaves, SERVED MEDIUM HOT; please talk to staff if you need this curry hot or mild.

items.name: Biryani
items.description: Slow cooked Basmati Rice with varieties of Nepalese and Indian spices served with raita.

items.description: Steamed rice.

items.name: Green Peas Pulao Rice
items.description: Green peas pulao rice.

items.name: Hot Chilli & Lemon Rice
items.description: Spicy rice.

items.name: Roti
items.description: Roti.

items.name: Naan
items.description: All naans already contain dairy and come with butter on top; please speak with our staff for a no-butter option (but no butter doesn't mean naan is dairy free). Keema Naan is stuffed with lamb mince.

items.description: Plain yoghurt.

items.description: Tamarind & dates chutney.

items.description: Mint & yoghurt sauce.

items.description: Momo chutney.

items.description: Lime pickle.

items.description: Sweet mango chutney.

items.description: Pappadums (GF).

items.description: Radish pickle.

items.name: Prawn Cracker Fry
items.description: Prawn cracker fry.

items.name: Fresh Green Salad
items.description: Fresh green salad.

items.name: Furandana / Puffed Rice / Beaten Rice (Chiura)
items.description: Furandana / puffed rice / beaten rice (chiura).

items.name: Papadum Platter (Papad & Dips)
items.description: Papadums served with raita and mint yoghurt or sweet mango pickle sauce as dips.

items.description: Caramelized balls / gulab jamun in Indo-Nepalese style.

items.name: Lalmohan 2pcs + Yoghurt
items.description: Caramelized balls / gulab jamun in Indo-Nepalese style with yoghurt.

items.name: Mango Pista Kulfi
items.description: Homemade ice cream with mango and pistachio flavour.

items.name: Rasmalai 2pcs
items.description: Milk flavoured dessert, popularly known as dudhbari in Nepal.

items.name: Gajar Haluwa
items.description: Sweet carrot pudding served warm.

items.name: Khir (Rice Pudding)
items.description: Rice cooked in milk with nuts, served warm.

items.name: Banquet Menu (minimum 4 people)
items.description: Minimum 4 people, $41.99 per person. STARTER: papadums. ENTRÉE: select 2 veg and 2 non-veg dishes (chicken tikka or chicken sekuwa; aloo ko achar or peanuts salad or tandoori soya chaap; Nepali samosa or mix veg pakauras; khasi ko bhutan or lamb seekh kebab or deep-fried fish). MAINS: select 2 veg and 2 non-veg curries, excluding prawns and platters (jhaneko daal or daal makhani; mix vegetable curry or potato cauliflower curry; chicken curry or butter chicken; goat or lamb curry). SERVED WITH rice & naan, raita or green salads. DESSERT: gulab jamoon or rasmalai or rice pudding or carrot pudding. We recommend the banquet menu for larger groups.
